items.title: Orchestra BioMed Joins Russell 3000® and Russell 2000® Indexes
items.summary: Orchestra BioMed Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBIO) announced its inclusion in the Russell 3000 Index and Russell 2000 Index following the 2026 Russell indexes reconstitution effective June 26, 2026. The biomedical company develops AVIM Therapy for hypertension in collaboration with Medtronic and Virtue SAB for atherosclerotic artery disease, both undergoing pivotal clinical trials.
